tech_news.title: iOS 26.4 adds brand new widgets for your iPhone’s Home Screen - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: iOS 26.4 comes packed with many new features, including brand new Ambient Music widgets that can be added to the iPhone’s Home Screen.

tech_news.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. After AI clickbait nonsense in its Google Discover news feed, it’s starting to mess with headlines in the “10 blue links” too.

tech_news.title: Nintendo reportedly planning Switch 2 revision with replaceable battery for Europe - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: New report details Nintendo Switch 2 revision which will feature a replaceable battery for Europe.

tech_news.title: After weeks of hype, Crimson Desert debuts to high player counts but "Mixed" Steam reviews, citing "disjointed graphics", lovable cats, "awful" UI and more - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Pearl Abyss' single player RPG spin-off Crimson Desert released last night, and has had a rocky debut.

tech_news.title: 10 tried-and-true methods to stay off your phone, according to our readers - NPR
tech_news.description: We asked our audience to share the creative ways they limit their own phone use. They range from the practical (keep your phone in another room) to the creative (pair your phone with a fun paperback).

tech_news.title: Microsoft: March Windows updates break Teams, OneDrive sign-ins - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Microsoft says the March Windows 11 update breaks sign-ins with Microsoft accounts across multiple Microsoft apps, including Teams and OneDrive.

tech_news.title: Apple Warns Older iPhones Vulnerable to Coruna, DarkSword Exploit Kit Attacks - The Hacker News
tech_news.description: Outdated iOS exploited via Coruna, DarkSword kits through web attacks, enabling mass data theft on unpatched devices.
